Package org.atmosphere.websocket

Class WebSocketProcessor.WebSocketHandlerProxy

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.websocket.WebSocketProcessor.WebSocketHandlerProxy

Enclosing interface:

public static final class WebSocketProcessor.WebSocketHandlerProxy extends Object implements WebSocketHandler
